name: MindReply - Compliance & Audit Pipeline
description: Automated compliance - GDPR right-to-be-forgotten, audit logging, data retention policies

parameters.jsCode: const email = $json.email; const requestType = $json.type; if (!email) throw new Error('Email required'); return { verified: true, email, requestType, verified_at: new Date().toISOString() };

parameters.query: UPDATE users SET email = 'deleted_' || id, name = 'Deleted User', phone = NULL WHERE email = '={{$json.email}}'; DELETE FROM user_activity WHERE user_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'deleted_' || id)
INSERT INTO audit_log (request_type, email, action, completed_at) VALUES ('={{$json.requestType}}', '={{$json.email}}', 'anonymized', NOW())
